Name: Brian McKenzie
Bio:
I have spent my career ensuring local government works effectively for you. I am running for re-election, bringing the experience and leadership necessary to lead this office with integrity and transparency. 
Throughout my 22 years of service, I have developed in-depth knowledge and expertise in the core functions of the office: election administration, records management, data privacy and administrative services.

Name: Scott Parke
Bio:
Scott Parke currently serves as the Davis County Controller, having been appointed after the previous Controller resigned mid-term. He brings more than 20 years of public-sector financial leadership. A Certified Public Accountant, Scott has dedicated his career to strengthening transparency, accountability, and long-term fiscal health in local government.
